summary: Contract Defaults 'Save as Default' feature testing complete. Backend APIs verified working. Frontend code implementation verified correct.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Backend GET /api/doula/contract-defaults returns saved defaults correctly (lines 3422-3429)

VERIFIED: Frontend openCreateModal() loads saved defaults and merges with DEFAULT_VALUES (lines 185-200)
VERIFIED: Frontend saveLastUsedDefaults() is called after creating a contract (lines 279, 293-326)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Contract defaults feature is fully implemented and working. Backend verified via pytest. Frontend code verified via code review.
